name: WOW Payments
description_short: WOW Payments is a merchant services and POS provider offering free payment processing, equipment, and cash advance loans for small businesses.
description_long:
WOW Payments operates as a comprehensive merchant services platform targeting small business owners and retailers. The company positions itself as a payment processing solution that eliminates traditional merchant fees, allowing businesses to retain 100% of their sales revenue. Their service model combines payment acceptance, POS equipment distribution, and financial products under one brand.

The core offerings include free payment processing (send, receive, transfer via ACH), invoice capabilities, payment card issuance, spending insights, and passive income features. WOW provides hardware through an equipment catalog featuring multiple tablet-based POS terminals ranging from small 4-inch devices (P2 Smartpad, L2Ks) to larger 15.6-inch systems (D2s KDS, T3 Pro Max). They also supply accessories including cash drawers, barcode scanners, kitchen printers, and networking equipment. The platform emphasizes zero processing fees, free equipment provision, compliance support, and transparent receipt generation.

WOW differentiates itself through an aggressive zero-fee model and integrated hardware distribution. Rather than traditional per-transaction pricing, they appear to monetize through equipment sales and ancillary services. Their savings calculator demonstrates potential annual savings of $3,500 on $100,000 in monthly volume, claiming full customer control with card or cash payment options. The brand emphasizes that customers "keep 100% of your sales" with no hidden processing fees.

However, the website lacks critical transparency regarding how this zero-fee model sustains operations, actual loan terms for their cash advance product, interest rates, repayment schedules, qualification requirements, and funding timelines. The business-loans category placement appears accurate given their cash advance offering, but detailed loan product information is unavailable. No regulatory disclosures, company registration details, licensing information, or third-party verification of zero-fee claims appear on the provided website content.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Claims zero processing fees with 100% customer revenue retention on card/cash payments
Provides free equipment (no upfront hardware costs for terminals, drawers, scanners)
Offers integrated suite including payment processing, invoicing, card issuance, and spending insights
Multiple POS terminal options at different sizes (4-inch to 15.6-inch displays) for various business types
Includes savings calculator to estimate cost reductions based on business volume
Emphasizes 100% PCI compliance and transparent, clear receipts
Provides cash advance loans tied to daily card sales for working capital
cons: Website provides no loan terms, interest rates, APR, repayment periods, or qualification criteria for cash advance product
No explanation of how zero-fee model is sustainable or how company generates revenue
Missing regulatory licensing, registration information, and third-party verification of zero-fee claims
Limited detail on equipment deployment process, hardware quality assurances, or support/warranty terms
No customer reviews, testimonials, or case studies visible to verify claims
best_for: Small retail businesses and restaurants seeking to eliminate merchant processing fees
Business owners needing integrated POS equipment and payment processing in one platform
Merchants with $10,000+ monthly sales volume who can capitalize on fee savings
Businesses requiring short-term working capital via cash advances against daily card sales
diagnosis: WOW Payments targets small merchants and retailers seeking fee-free payment processing combined with affordable POS hardware. However, the complete absence of loan product details (terms, rates, APR, repayment schedule, eligibility) and lack of transparency around the zero-fee business model sustainability represent significant gaps that warrant caution; potential users should request detailed product specifications and independent verification before committing.
services: POS terminal equipment (D2s KDS, P3 Mix, P3HK, P2 Smartpad, L2Ks, P3H, T3 Pro Max)
Barcode scanners and QR code readers
Cash advance loans against daily card sales
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
